notes: Runs a two-handed staff, so there is no off-hand slot. Haste-lean gemming (Reckless) keeps Wild Growth and Rejuvenation ticking faster. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
